# OpenClaw Agent Index

## Support posture

- OpenClaw v0 is projected for repository and CLI usage only.
- Gateway or channel-native runtime parity is explicitly out of scope.
- Approval gates and validation hooks are surfaced through external-runner metadata instead of native runtime interception.

## Available agents

- `Creative Director` (`agents/creative-director.md`) — Final creative authority for game vision, tone, and cross-discipline direction.
- `Producer` (`agents/producer.md`) — Coordinates sprint planning, milestone delivery, and cross-team production risk management.
- `QA Lead` (`agents/qa-lead.md`) — Owns test strategy, bug triage, regression planning, and release quality gates.
- `Technical Director` (`agents/technical-director.md`) — Owns architecture, technology decisions, and performance-risk strategy across systems.

## Workspace entrypoints

- `SOUL.md` explains the repo-level operating contract and fallback boundaries.
- `skills/*/SKILL.md` preserves skill packaging for CLI invocation and repository browsing.
